notes: Verification: `npm run repo:hygiene` ✅ — 431 tracked files, no Cyrillic.; `npm run typecheck` ✅.; `npm run engine:check:examples` ✅ — 5 projects.; `npm run imports:check` / `systems:check` ✅.; `npm run test` ✅ — 65 files, 412 tests.; `npm run engine:doctor -- examples/hello-3d` / `-- examples/beacon-world` — both clean, vendor chunks reported separately within their budgets.
